name: 14oz Glass Candle with Cork Lid Cucumber Water and Mint - Threshold™
description: Excellent for aromatherapy, the Glass Candle with Cork Lid Cucumber Water and Mint - Threshold™ makes for a great relaxing evening. Molded into a neat and reusable glass body, this candle burns for 30 hrs, acting as the perfect stress buster. With two long wicks, this 14-oz. candle is great for meditation, keeping you fully immersed in tranquility with Cucumber Water and Mint scents. With palm oil and paraffin wax blend, transcend to a whole another level of peace and comfort.
